teamStatsDashboard.title: Team Statistics
teamStatsDashboard.latestMatchRight: Latest match is on the right

tooltips.showMetricOptions: Show metric options to be selected

manual.subtitle: Complete guide to using the Premier League Statistics Explorer

teams.overview: The Team Pages provide a comprehensive interface to explore Premier League teams, their seasonal performance, detailed statistics, and advanced metrics.
teams.searchBarDesc: Type team names to filter the list in real-time (case-insensitive)
teams.seasonFilterDesc: Filter teams by the seasons they participated in
teams.multipleFilters: Multiple filters can be active simultaneously
teams.itemCounterDesc: Shows current count of displayed teams in top-left
teams.teamCardsDesc: Click any team card to navigate to that team's detailed page with statistics and metrics.
teams.logoBackground: Background uses team colors extracted from the logo
teams.logoPattern: Diagonal stripe pattern with dynamic color adjustment
teams.seasonCardsDesc: Click any season to load statistics for that specific period
teams.allSeasonsButtonDesc: Aggregates data from all seasons the team participated in
teams.selectedSeason: Selected season updates the URL and triggers automatic statistics loading
teams.statsHeader: Click the header to expand/collapse. Provides comprehensive statistics:
teams.formationsCardDesc: Shows all formations used with match counts
teams.formationClick: Click any formation to see detailed lineup information
teams.streaksDesc: Biggest win/draw/loss streaks and team form badges (W/D/L)
teams.clearStatsButtonDesc: Removes statistics display and resets view
teams.metricSelectionDesc: Use multi-select dropdown to choose metrics
teams.seasonMetricFilterDesc: Filter metrics by "all seasons" or specific season
teams.chartTypesDesc: Switch between Bar, Line, Pie, and Donut charts
teams.sharedGraphsDesc: Some metrics combine into grouped visualizations
teams.pageNavigatorDesc: Fixed sidebar on right with quick links to sections
teams.autoScrollDesc: Page automatically scrolls to loaded content
teams.hoverEffectsDesc: Cards lift and highlight on hover
teams.responsiveDesc: Adapts to desktop (multi-column) and mobile (stacked) layouts
teams.matchesDashboardDesc: Overview of all matches with detailed information
teams.matchesTableDesc: Shows list of matches with detailed information
teams.colTeamsDesc: Teams that participated in the match
teams.colVenueDesc: Stadium where the match was held

players.overview: The Player Pages allow you to explore individual player statistics, performance metrics, and career data across multiple teams and seasons.
players.searchPlaceholder: Type player names to filter the list in real-time
players.teamFilterDesc: Filter players by teams they played for
players.hoverRows: Hover effects on table rows for better readability
players.playerSeasonCardsDesc: Click to load statistics for specific seasons
players.playerAutoLoad: Automatic data loading when season is selected
players.playerStatsExpand: Click header to expand/collapse. Eight comprehensive categories:
players.gamesDesc: Total matches played, Total minutes played, Player rating
players.goalsAssistsDesc: Total goals and assists, Total shots and shots on target
players.duelsDesc: Total duels and duels won, Dribble attempts and successful dribbles
players.disciplineDesc: Red cards (red text), Yellow cards (yellow text), Fouls committed and drawn
players.penaltiesDesc: Penalties scored (green text), Penalties missed (red text), Penalties won
players.goalkeeperStatsDesc: Goals conceded, Saves, Penalties saved, Shows "No data" if player is not a goalkeeper
players.noDataCategoryDesc: Each card shows "No data available" if the player has no statistics in that category for the selected season.
players.playerMetricMultiDesc: Multi-select dropdown for choosing advanced metrics
players.playerMetricSeasonDesc: Apply to specific season or all seasons
players.playerMetricChartDesc: Multiple chart types for data analysis
players.playerClearStatsDesc: Reset and clear all loaded statistics

seasons.overview: The Season Pages provide a comprehensive view of entire Premier League seasons, including aggregate statistics and league standings.
seasons.seasonClick: Click any season card to view detailed statistics and rankings
seasons.noSeasonFiltersDesc: Filters are not available on season pages (seasons only filter)
seasons.statsComprehensive: Comprehensive aggregate statistics for the entire season:
seasons.seasonHeaderContent: Season year displayed prominently, Total players count, Total player appearances
seasons.overviewCardsContent: Total Goals, Total Assists, Total Shots, Total Passes
seasons.shootingDesc: Total shots and shots on target, Shot accuracy percentage with progress bar
seasons.passingDesc: Total passes and key passes, Key pass rate percentage with progress bar
seasons.duelsDesc: Total duels and duels won, Duel win rate percentage, Dribble attempts and successful dribbles, Dribble success rate percentage
seasons.disciplineDesc: Yellow cards (yellow icon and text), Red cards (red icon and text), Fouls committed and drawn
seasons.penaltiesDesc: Penalties scored and missed, Conversion rate percentage with progress bar
seasons.rankingInteractive: Interactive league standings table with advanced sorting:
seasons.sortingDesc: Click any sort button to apply, Click again to reverse order (ascending/descending), Active sort highlighted with green accent, Arrow icon shows current direction
seasons.colRankDesc: Rank position with trophy icons for top 3
seasons.colTeamDesc: Team name with form bar indicator
seasons.colGDDesc: Goal difference (color-coded: green positive, red negative)
seasons.colWPctDesc: Win rate percentage (color-coded: green ≥50%, yellow ≥30%, red <30%)
seasons.formBarsDesc: Visual indicator under team names showing win rate
seasons.topHighlightDesc: 1st, 2nd, and 3rd place rows have subtle background colors
seasons.hoverRowsDesc: Rows highlight on hover for better readability
seasons.navigationSeasonNavDesc: Fixed sidebar with quick links to Season Stats and Season Ranking, Smooth Scrolling for section links
seasons.compareTeamsDesc: Use different sort options to compare team performance
seasons.defensiveAnalysisDesc: Sort by "Goals Conceded" to find best defenses
seasons.attackingAnalysisDesc: Sort by "Goals Scored" to find top attacking teams
seasons.efficiencyDesc: Use "Points / Match" or "Win Rate %" for performance consistency
seasons.formAnalysisDesc: Visual form bars show team quality at a glance
seasons.matchesDescription: The Matches section provides a comprehensive overview of all matches played in the season, with powerful filtering and sorting capabilities to explore match details.
seasons.expandMatchesDesc: Click to view all matches for a selected team
seasons.matchesDisplayedDesc: Number of matches shown per page

compare.title: Compare
compare.overview: The Compare Pages provide powerful head-to-head comparison tools for analyzing players, teams, or entire seasons side-by-side. Use advanced metrics and visualizations to discover performance differences and identify statistical winners.
compare.indexOverview: The main compare page presents three comparison options as large, clickable cards:
compare.step1: Click on any of the three comparison type cards
compare.step2: You'll be taken to the dedicated comparison interface for that category
compare.step3: Select your items to compare and view detailed statistical breakdowns
compare.layoutConsistent: All comparison pages follow a consistent structure with two main sections:
compare.layoutSelection: Selection Area (top) - Choose what to compare
compare.layoutStats: Stats Comparison (bottom) - View detailed statistical breakdown
compare.bothSeasons: Both dropdowns list all available seasons from 2006-2018
compare.sameSeasonError: Cannot select the same season twice
compare.selectBothSeasons: Must select both seasons before stats will load
compare.urlParams: Selections update the URL query parameters automatically
compare.onceBothSelected: Once both seasons are selected, the page displays:
compare.headerLayout: Layout: First Season | VS Badge | Second Season
compare.headerStyling: Purple gradient styling with prominent "VS" badge in the center
compare.winnerDisplay: Displays the overall statistical winner based on all compared metrics:
compare.winnerText: "Overall Winner: [Season Name]" if one season dominates
compare.tieText: "It's a Tie!" if both seasons are statistically equal
compare.winBreakdownDesc: Shows "XW vs YW out of Z metrics"
compare.winMetric1: X = number of metrics the first season wins
compare.winMetric2: Y = number of metrics the second season wins
compare.winMetric3: Z = total number of comparable metrics
compare.barPercentages: Percentages displayed if each side is >15% wide
compare.bannerWinner: Gold/yellow tint if there's a clear winner
compare.gridOrganized: Organized into 7 statistical categories, each with its own icon and metrics:
compare.attackingDesc: Goals, Assists, Total Shots, Shots on Target, Shot Accuracy %
compare.duelsDribblesDesc: Total Duels, Duels Won, Duel Win Rate %, Dribble Attempts, Dribbles Successful, Dribble Success %
compare.defensiveDesc: Tackles: Total tackles made (higher is better)
compare.disciplineDesc: Yellow Cards, Red Cards, Fouls Committed, Fouls Drawn
compare.layoutMetric: Layout: Each metric row shows: First Value | Metric Label | Second Value
compare.boldHighlight: Bold/highlighted value = winner for that metric
compare.codeRed: Red = negative metrics (cards, fouls, missed penalties)
compare.missingDataDesc: Shows "-" if data unavailable for that metric
compare.lowerMetrics: Some metrics favor lower values (marked above):
compare.lowerExamples: Yellow Cards, Red Cards, Fouls Committed, Penalties Missed
compare.lowerWins: The season with the lower value wins these comparisons
compare.useStep1: Click the left dropdown to select the first team
compare.useStep2: Type to filter/search team names in real-time
compare.useStep3: Click a team from the filtered list to select
compare.useStep4: Selected team name appears in the input field
compare.useStep5: Click the X icon to clear selection and start over
compare.useStep6: Repeat for the right dropdown to select second team
compare.indicatorDown: Down arrow = dropdown closed, click to open
compare.indicatorUp: Up arrow = dropdown open, showing options
compare.indicatorX: X icon = selection made, click to clear
compare.afterTeamsSelected: After both teams are selected, two new dropdowns appear below:
compare.seasonShowsOnly: Shows only seasons that team participated in
compare.seasonOption: Option: "all seasons" - aggregates all available data for that team
compare.eachTeamDesc: Each team can have a different season selected
compare.exampleComp: Example: Compare Team A in 2008 vs Team B in 2015
compare.exampleOr: Or compare Team A's 2010 season vs their "all seasons" aggregate
compare.cantCompareTeam: Cannot compare a team with itself
compare.selectBothTeams: Must select both teams AND their respective seasons
compare.teamHeaderLayout: Layout: Team 1 Name | VS | Team 2 Name
compare.teamWinCount: Win count breakdown (e.g., "15W vs 12W out of 27 metrics")
compare.goalsPerformanceDesc: Goals Scored (green), Goals Conceded (red), Clean Sheets (green), Failed to Score (red)
compare.streaksDesc: Win Streak (green), Draw Streak, Loss Streak (red)
compare.tacticalsFormations: Shows tactical formations used by each team:
compare.matchFormationCountDesc: Number of matches each formation was used
compare.expandableDesc: Click any formation row to expand
compare.visualForm: Visual representation of recent match results:
compare.readingDirectionDesc: Latest match is on the RIGHT
compare.penaltyKicks: Penalty kick statistics for each team:
compare.typeNames: Type player names to filter list instantly
compare.clearSelectionDesc: Click X to reset and choose different player
compare.individualSeasonsPlayer: Individual seasons the player participated in
compare.playerMix1: Compare Player A's 2012 season vs Player B's entire career
compare.playerMix2: Or compare same season for both players
compare.playerMix3: Complete flexibility in time period selection
compare.cantCompareSelf: Cannot compare a player with themselves
compare.selectBothPlayers: Must select both players and their seasons
compare.urlPlayerSelect: URL updates with all selections for sharing
compare.calculatesAcross: Calculates winner across ALL player metrics (6 categories)
compare.attackingPlayerDesc: Goals (green), Assists (green), Shots, On Target (green), Dribbles Won (green), Dribble Attempts
compare.defensivePlayerDesc: Tackles, Interceptions (green), Blocks (green), Duels, Duels Won (green)
compare.disciplinePlayerDesc: Fouls Committed (red), Fouls Drawn (green), Yellow Cards (yellow), Red Cards (red)
compare.goalkeeperDesc: Saves (green), Goals Conceded (red), Penalties Saved (green), Note: Shows "-" for non-goalkeepers
compare.ifEither: If either player has penalty data:
compare.urlPreserves: Advanced features preserve selections in URL:
compare.shareableLinkDesc: Copy URL to share exact comparison
compare.replacesContent: Replaces content area until data arrives
compare.selectBothSeasonMsg: "Please select both [items] and their seasons" - missing season
compare.noStatsMsg: "No stats available" - valid selection but no data
compare.desktopDesc: Side-by-side layouts maintained, Wide comparison grids, All sections fully visible
compare.mobileDesc: Stacked layouts for better readability, Dropdowns become full-width, Metrics stack vertically, Touch-friendly targets
compare.eraComparisonDesc: Compare early seasons (2006-2009) vs modern seasons (2015-2018)
compare.teamEvolutionDesc: Compare same team across different seasons
compare.playerPeakDesc: Compare player's best season vs career average ("all seasons")
compare.positionalComparisonDesc: Compare players in same position (both forwards, etc.)
compare.styleAnalysisDesc: Use formation data to understand tactical differences
compare.contextMinutes: Higher minutes doesn't always mean better player (could be lack of alternatives)
compare.contextFouls: More fouls committed might indicate aggressive defensive style
compare.contextCleanSheets: Clean sheets depend on entire team defense, not just one player
compare.patternAttack: Does one player excel in multiple attacking categories?
compare.patternDiscipline: Is a team consistently winning discipline metrics (fewer cards)?
compare.patternPassing: Which season had better overall passing efficiency?
compare.multipleDesc: Compare 3+ items by doing multiple comparisons
compare.multipleExample: Example: A vs B, then B vs C, then A vs C
compare.multipleFuller: Build a fuller picture of relative strengths
compare.screenshotDesc: Overall winner banner is perfect for sharing
compare.fastLoadingDesc: Parallel API requests fetch both items simultaneously
compare.errorRecoveryDesc: If one item fails, error message explains which one
compare.smartCachingDesc: Season lists cached after first load
compare.step1Verify: Verify both items are selected (check both dropdowns)
compare.step3Check: Check that selections are different (no duplicate items)
compare.step4Look: Look for error messages - they explain the issue
compare.clickField: Click directly on the input field
compare.ifNothing: If nothing appears, check for error messages
compare.tryClearing: Try clearing selection (X icon) and reselecting
compare.refreshStuck: Refresh page if dropdown seems stuck
compare.normalDash: This is normal - not all players/teams have all data types
compare.goalkeeperOnly: Goalkeeper stats only exist for goalkeepers
compare.incompleteData: Some older seasons may have incomplete data
compare.ensureEntire: Ensure entire URL was copied (including query parameters after ?)
compare.checkIds: Check that IDs in URL are valid (items might have been deleted)
compare.tryManually: Try manually reselecting items if URL fails
compare.seasonQuickDesc: Simple dropdown selection, 7 metric categories, Overall statistical winner
compare.teamQuickDesc: Searchable team selection, Independent season choice per team, Formation and form analysis, 3 metric categories + formations + form
compare.playerQuickDesc: Searchable player selection, Independent season choice per player, 6 comprehensive metric categories, Goalkeeper-specific stats
compare.universalDesc: Overall winner calculation, Visual percentage dominance bar, Shareable URLs, Auto-scroll to results, Responsive mobile design, Color-coded metrics, Hover effects and interactions
